svg.text: Markscheme answer
Q1
Part (a)
METHOD 1 (Cartesian form)

text.font-family: Cambria Math, STIX Two Math, Times New Roman, serif

svg.text: Given: Use de Moivre ’s theorem to find the roots of the equation z4 = 1 – i.

text.font-family: Cambria Math, STIX Two Math, Times New Roman, serif

svg.text: Write z = a + bi and equate real/imaginary parts.

text.font-family: Cambria Math, STIX Two Math, Times New Roman, serif

svg.text: |z| = √(a² + b²), arg(z) = atan(b/a) (adjust quadrant).

text.font-family: Cambria Math, STIX Two Math, Times New Roman, serif

svg.text: Use z̄ = a - bi where needed.
State final result in requested form.
METHOD 2 (polar form)

text.font-family: Cambria Math, STIX Two Math, Times New Roman, serif

svg.text: Write z = r(cosθ + i sinθ) = r cisθ.

text.font-family: Cambria Math, STIX Two Math, Times New Roman, serif

svg.text: Use De Moivre: z^n = r^n cis(nθ), then convert back if needed.
Part (b)
METHOD 1 (Cartesian form)
Given: Draw these roots on an Argand diagram.

text.font-family: Cambria Math, STIX Two Math, Times New Roman, serif

svg.text: Write z = a + bi and equate real/imaginary parts.

text.font-family: Cambria Math, STIX Two Math, Times New Roman, serif

svg.text: |z| = √(a² + b²), arg(z) = atan(b/a) (adjust quadrant).

text.font-family: Cambria Math, STIX Two Math, Times New Roman, serif

svg.text: Use z̄ = a - bi where needed.
State final result in requested form.
Part (c)
METHOD 1 (Cartesian form)
Given: If z1 is the root in the first quadrant and z2 is the root in the second quadrant, find
1 2 z z in the form a + ib.

text.font-family: Cambria Math, STIX Two Math, Times New Roman, serif

svg.text: Write z = a + bi and equate real/imaginary parts.

text.font-family: Cambria Math, STIX Two Math, Times New Roman, serif

svg.text: |z| = √(a² + b²), arg(z) = atan(b/a) (adjust quadrant).

text.font-family: Cambria Math, STIX Two Math, Times New Roman, serif

svg.text: Use z̄ = a - bi where needed.
State final result in requested form.
METHOD 2 (polar form)

text.font-family: Cambria Math, STIX Two Math, Times New Roman, serif

svg.text: Write z = r(cosθ + i sinθ) = r cisθ.

text.font-family: Cambria Math, STIX Two Math, Times New Roman, serif

svg.text: Use De Moivre: z^n = r^n cis(nθ), then convert back if needed.
